typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tighter leading-none font-bold
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-none font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.grid_mode: MODE A: THE 'TETRIS' GRID (Asymmetrical, wide gaps gap-8 to gap-12)
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align for text and dense content, optical alignment for buttons
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders for a technical engineering look, Crystal Glass for sticky header

components.header: Sticky nav with Crystal Glass (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 in light, bg-[#050A15]/70 in dark), 1px delicate inner stroke.
components.buttons: Square or slight rounded-md corners. Solid primary color with hover lift (-translate-y-1) and slight shadow.
components.cards: Flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no shadow by default. Hover adds shadow-lg and slight lift.
components.skills_section: Bento grid layout with animated progress bars (Shadcn Progress) and modern icons.
components.timeline: Vertical line with dot indicators, staggered entrance animations using Framer Motion.
components.map: Interactive world map using react-simple-maps to highlight Maldives, Kenya, Uganda, Myanmar.
components.contact_form: Shadcn Form, Input, Textarea with pure technical borders, focus states ring-2 ring-primary.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Explicit hover states on all interactive elements (e.g., hover:bg-slate-100 dark:hover:bg-slate-800).
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up for lists and grid items.
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion, ARIA labels for purely decorative icons.

Home.Hero: Name: Manameldura Srikan D. Dewasumithra. Role: Civil Engineer | Master of Construction Management (AUT). Tagline. CTAs.
Home.About: 10+ years international construction, studying at AUT. Passion for sustainable construction.
Home.Featured_Projects: Bento grid of 5 projects (Maldives, Kenya, Uganda, Myanmar) with images and brief overview. Click opens detail (or goes to page).
Home.Research: Master's Research spotlight on Seismic-Resilient Timber Structural Systems.
Home.Skills: Grid of animated progress bars for tech/management skills.
Home.Contact: Form + Info (Email, Phone, LinkedIn, Location Auckland NZ).

testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case format based on role.
instructions_to_main_agent: Use react-simple-maps for the interactive map highlighting project locations.
Use framer-motion for scroll-triggered entrance animations, especially the career timeline.
Ensure dark mode is toggleable via next-themes.
Follow the 'Tetris' grid layout for projects and 'Grid Borders' surface strategy to emulate structural/engineering aesthetics.
Use Shadcn UI extensively but remove default styles to match the high-contrast architectural look.
All interactive elements MUST have explicit hover styles ensuring minimum contrast ratios.
Text over images MUST use gradient overlays or background blur to maintain readability.
Add 'lucide-react' for icons and 'react-simple-maps' for the interactive map.
Use the layout provided in the JSON to structure the sections seamlessly on a single scrolling homepage.
